productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Ess 3s Rainjkt Black Jackets
description: CompositionBlack hooded rain jacket made of 100% nylon, has a mesh lining, long raglan sleeves with elasticated cuffs, hood with lace drawstring, zippered front placket with velcro flap on top of it, insert pockets on the sides with buttoned closures, elasticated hemline, brand name on the upper left chest in reflective print and iconic white stripes on the sleevesFittingRegularWash careWash in water below 40 degreesWash dark colours separatelyDo not soak, tumble dry, bleach or dry cleanDry in shadeWarm ironDo not iron on prints/trims/logoLook cool when it pours in this black jacket from adidas. The iconic three stipes on the sleeves and the brand name on the upper chest adds to the brand image, while the nylon fabric and the mesh lining keeps you feeling dry. Team this with tracks, tees and performance shoes for a jog in the park when it's drizzling or wear it with jeans and tees for casual wear. Model statisticsThe model wears size M in jacketsHeight-6.2', Shoulders-16"
